name: Arista Networks, Inc.
summary: Arista Networks designs and sells cloud networking solutions including hardware switches, routers, and software platforms. Its flagship Extensible Operating System (EOS) underpins a network-as-a-service portfolio spanning AI Centers, Data Centers, Campus, and WAN environments. Arista serves Cloud and AI Titans, AI and Specialty Providers, and Enterprise customers globally, offering products across Core networking, Cognitive Adjacencies (campus and routing), and Cognitive Networks (software and services).
